audit.subtitle: Append-only record of every terminal control-plane decision. Read-only; entries are never edited or deleted.
audit.viewPurpose: The append-only record of every terminal control-plane decision - one row per event that reached a verdict. Read-only: entries are never edited or deleted, and each carries the recorded reason it happened.
audit.pendingEntry: Audit entry #{seq} is not in the loaded rows. Load more to continue the search.
audit.unavailableEntry: Audit entry #{seq} is unavailable in this filtered audit result.
audit.loadMoreError: Failed to load more audit rows: {message}

trace.subtitle: Reconstruct the pipeline path for one correlation id. Read-only projection over the audit log; the trace is never re-executed.
trace.idle: Enter a correlation id and select Fetch trace.
trace.viewPurpose: Reconstructs one incident end-to-end from the audit log: every pipeline stage for a single correlation id, in order, with the decision and recorded reason at each step. Answers what happened to this event and why. Read-only.
trace.headline: {count} step(s) for {correlation}
trace.empty: No audit steps for this correlation id.

delivery.viewPurpose: Read-only reliability metrics for durable operator-channel replies.
delivery.glossaryPlain: a reply that may have reached the provider without a confirmed acknowledgement
delivery.headline: {deliveries} deliveries; {risks} duplicate risks
delivery.bannerBody: Pause, resume, retry, and resend remain authenticated channel commands.

incidents.notLoaded: Incident {id} is not in the loaded results.
incidents.continueSearch: Load more to continue the search.
incidents.filteredUnavailable: It is unavailable in this filtered incident result.

contextSelection.unavailable: Context policy evidence is not wired.
contextSelection.subtitle: Read-only baseline and shadow evidence. Promotion and rollback remain governed server-side.
contextSelection.bannerBody: This view has no install, promotion, demotion, rollback, or kill-switch controls.

continuations.viewPurpose: Read-only anchors linking exact scheduled runs and evidence to authorized conversations.
continuations.glossaryPlain: a scoped conversation anchor for one exact scheduled result
continuations.headline: {count} active anchors
continuations.bannerBody: Opening or expiring an anchor requires an authenticated operator command.

blueprints.viewPurpose: Read-only evidence cards for recurring operator work that may become a reviewed scheduled task.
blueprints.glossaryPlain: an inert recurring-work suggestion that requires explicit review
blueprints.headline: {count} candidates; {materialized} materialized
blueprints.bannerBody: Candidates are disabled and shadow-only. Review and materialization happen in authenticated operator channels.

scope.bannerBody: Monitoring and action scope come from policy-as-code. The executor boundary remains the hard privilege ceiling.
scope.actionHint: included resources eligible for governed action
scope.artifactBannerBody: The builder prepares policy-as-code for review. It never changes monitoring, action scope, or executor permissions from the browser.
scope.artifactCommentTitle: FDAI governance scope change - open as a remediation / config PR.
scope.artifactCommentSource: Generated read-only by the operator console; never applied from a button.

approvals.viewPurpose: High-risk actions the risk gate parked for a human approver instead of auto-executing. Read-only: approvals happen in authenticated operator channels, never a console button, and never through self-approval. Each item shows the recorded reason it needs a human.
